links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The lunulated antbird (Oneillornis lunulatus) is a species of insectivorous bird in the subfamily Thamnophilinae of the family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Ecuador and Peru.Remsen, J
